text.title: Playwright Automation Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for playwright-automation.

conclusion.verdict: do NOT use Playwright; use httpx/fetch instead

branch.question: Is auth required across many runs?

conclusion.verdict: Playwright test with inline login (still role locators)
escalate — Playwright + stealth or managed service; do not paper over with sleeps

text.example: target.renders=client_side_spa → auth_runs>1 → Playwright + storageState. Conclusion: write tests/global-setup.ts then tests/orders.spec.ts using getByRole. Rule: auth-via-storage-state.
